autoCapture.title: Auto Capture
autoCapture.description: Periodically capture screen and analyze work context

quickNote.title: Quick Note
quickNote.shortcutHint: Enter to save · Shift+Enter for new line

quickNoteWindow.title: Quick Note
quickNoteWindow.shortcutHint: Enter to save · Esc to close

historyViewer.title: History Records
historyViewer.confirmDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this record? This action cannot be undone.

tagCloud.title: Tag Cloud
tagCloud.clickToFilter: Click a tag to filter records
tagCloud.noTagsHint: No tags yet. You can add tags to records in history.
tagCloud.confirmDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete tag "{name}"?
tagCloud.deleteWarning: This tag will be removed from all associated records.

settings.title: Settings
settings.visionRequired: Requires a model with Vision capability
settings.analysisPromptPlaceholder: Leave empty to use default prompt
settings.reportTitleHint: Use {date} as date placeholder, leave empty for default format
settings.reportModelPlaceholder: Leave empty to use analysis model
settings.textModelHint: Text-only model is fine, no Vision needed
settings.reportPromptPlaceholder: Leave empty to use default prompt. Use {records} to insert today's records
settings.includeQuickNotesHint: (Uncheck to use only auto screenshot analysis)
settings.tagCategoriesPlaceholder: One tag per line, leave empty for default categories
settings.tagCategoriesHint: AI will select the most matching category from these tags during analysis
settings.changeThresholdHint: Skip screenshot when screen change is below this ratio to avoid duplicate records
settings.maxSilentTimeHint: Force a record even if screen hasn't changed after this time
settings.autoAdjustHint: Automatically adjust based on work mode: higher threshold during deep work, lower during active work
settings.autoAdjustRangeHint: System automatically evaluates and adjusts threshold hourly (range: 10-60 minutes)
settings.autoDetectHint: Automatically learn work time from screenshot activity patterns, pause capture during non-work hours
settings.continueLearningHint: Continue using to learn your work patterns
settings.workTimeOffHint: When off, system will capture screenshots around the clock
settings.whitelistPlaceholder: Enter app name and press Enter to add to whitelist
settings.filterMatchHint: Matches window title or process name, supports partial matching
settings.blacklistPlaceholder: Enter app name and press Enter to add to blacklist
settings.whitelistOnlyHint: (When enabled, only capture apps in whitelist)
settings.noVaultConfigured: No vault configured, please add one
settings.noGraphConfigured: No graph configured, please add one
settings.notionHint: Reports will auto-sync to Notion database. Create an Integration in Notion first and share the database.
settings.githubHint: Track commit and PR activity time for specified repos to generate work time reports. Token requires repo permission.
settings.slackHint: Automatically send notification to Slack channel after report generation. Create an Incoming Webhook in Slack first.
